title: UPI Turns 10: 703 Banks Live, 60 Crore Daily Transactions; IMF Calls It World’s Largest Real-Time Payment System
description: In 10 years, UPI grew from 2 crore to 24,162 crore transactions worth Rs 314 lakh crore in FY26, now handles 49% of global real-time payments with 66 crore daily transactions and 703 banks live, per the Finance Ministry.
